heading: Cluster Availability
body:
If you are using a `mongodb+srv://` [connection string](manual/reference/connection-string) and your driver or shell can't find the
DNS host of the Atlas cluster, the cluster
might be paused or deleted. Check that the cluster exists. If
this is a paused cluster, you can [resume](resume-cluster) the cluster if necessary.

> **Note:** Atlas automatically pauses idle Free clusters (formerly known as `M0`) after 30 days
> with no connections.
